name: Yanqing
desc: General Jing Yuan's retainer. A gifted swordsman who hasn't even come of age.\nNo one can best Yanqing when he holds a sword in hand.

1.name: Svelte Saber
1.desc: When Yanqing attacks a Frozen enemy, he deals Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of his ATK.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

2.name: Supine Serenade
2.desc: When Soulsteel Sync is active, Energy Regeneration Rate increases by an extra <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Sword Savant
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Searing Sting
4.desc: When the current HP percentage is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or higher, this unit's Ice <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

5.name: Surging Strife
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Swift Swoop
6.desc: If the <u>buff</u>s from "Soulsteel Sync" or the Ultimate are in effect when an enemy is defeated, the duration of these <u>buffs</u> is extended by 1 turn.

10000009.name: Buff
10000009.desc: All status effects that provide beneficial combat buffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

120901.name: Frost Thorn
120901.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Yanqing's ATK to one designated enemy.
120901.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one enemy.

120902.name: Darting Ironthorn
120902.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Yanqing's ATK to one designated enemy and activates "Soulsteel Sync" for 1 turn.
120902.simple_desc: Deals Ice DMG to one designated enemy and activates the "Soulsteel Sync."

120903.name: Amidst the Raining Bliss
120903.desc: Increases Yanqing's CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When "Soulsteel Sync" is active, increases Yanqing's CRIT DMG by an extra <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. This <u>buff</u> lasts for one turn. Afterwards, deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Yanqing's ATK to one designated enemy.
120903.simple_desc: Increases Yanqing's CRIT Rate. Enhances "Soulsteel Sync" and deals massive Ice DMG to one enemy.

10000009.name: Buff
10000009.desc: All status effects that provide beneficial combat buffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

120904.name: One With the Sword
120904.desc: When "Soulsteel Sync" is active, Yanqing is less likely to be attacked by enemies. Yanqing's CRIT Rate increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> and his CRIT DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Yanqing attacks an enemy, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>fixed chance</u> to launch <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Yanqing's ATK to the enemy, which has a <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Freeze the enemy for 1 turn.\nThe Frozen target cannot take action and receives Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Yanqing's ATK at the beginning of each turn.\nWhen Yanqing receives DMG, the "Soulsteel Sync" effect will disappear.
120904.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>During "Soulsteel Sync"</color>, reduces the chance of this character being attacked and <color=#f29e38ff>increases their CRIT Rate and CRIT DMG</color>. <color=#f29e38ff>After attacking an enemy</color>, there is a chance of launching a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing Ice DMG with a chance to Freeze the target.\n"Soulsteel Sync" will be removed after this character receives damage.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

30000002.name: Fixed Chance
30000002.desc: Fixed chance will not be affected by any factor.

120906.name: Attack
120906.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

120907.name: The One True Sword
120907.desc: After using his Technique, at the start of the next battle, Yanqing deals <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> more DMG for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s) to enemies whose current HP percentage is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or higher.
120907.simple_desc: After this character uses Technique, at the start of the next battle, increases the DMG dealt by this character to enemy targets whose HP percentage is <unbreak>50%</unbreak> or higher.

1.point_desc: After Yanqing attacks, deals Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Yanqing's ATK to enemies with Ice Weakness.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

1.point_desc: When Soulsteel Sync is active, Effect RES increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
When a CRIT Hit is triggered, increases SPD by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
